The most rational, sustainable and long-term solution to the problem of malnutrition is ensuring availability, accessability and consumption of adequate amounts of foods. Dietary guidelines help to achieve the objective of providing optimal nutrition to the population. References 1. World Bank Development Indicators database, World Bank, revised, 10-Sep 2008. 2.
